mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ntnl_pnt_no_m SET use_flag = #{useFlag}, accdnt_area_flag = #{accdntAreaFlag}, lctn_sign_no = #{lctnSignNo}, sgg_cd = #{sggCd}, instl_type_cd = #{instlTypeCd}, x_crdnt = #{xcrdnt}, y_crdnt = #{ycrdnt}, z_crdnt = #{zcrdnt}, lng = #{lng}, lat = #{lat}, hght = #{hght}, srt_sq = #{srtSq}, upt_user_id = #{uptUserId}, upt_date_time = now(), instl_cd = #{instlCd} WHERE ntnl_pnt_seq=#{ntnlPntSeq}
